# Dr. Kaushal Pokhrel - LASER Eye Surgeon

> Leading Refractive & Cataract Surgeon in Kathmandu, Nepal. Specializing in LASIK, SMILE Pro, and advanced eye care surgery.

## Core Information
- **Name**: Dr. Kaushal Pokhrel
- **Specialty**: Ophthalmology (Refractive & Cataract Surgery)
- **Location**: Tilganga Institute of Ophthalmology, Kathmandu, Nepal
- **Key Services**: SMILE Pro, SILK, Femto LASIK, PRK, Presbyond, ICL/IPCL, CLE/Cataract Surgery.

## Surgery Details
- **SMILE Pro**: Next-gen minimal incision laser vision correction.
- **SILK**: Advanced refractive procedure for vision precision.
- **Femto LASIK**: All-laser LASIK for personalized vision correction.
- **Presbyond**: Laser solution for reading vision (presbyopia).
- **ICL**: Implantable Collamer Lens for high myopia.

## Patient Reviews
The site features testimonials from verified patients across various surgery types, highlighting professionalism, painless procedures, and life-changing results.
